title: Outlook integration: Add possibility to set the meeting location from Monday
excerpt:
Hi, 
It would be really great to be able to add the meeting location in Outlook from a location column in Monday.

posts.author: gdacier (Guillaume Dacier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

It would be really great to be able to add the meeting location in Outlook from a location column in Monday.

posts.author: Graham.MacGillivray (Graham MacGillivray)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone looked into this. It’d be super helpful.
